<!--
Thanks for adding a recipe! A few notes:

- Put the recipe in `recipes/<shortname>/recipe.md` (e.g. `recipes/banana_bread/recipe.md`).
- Optional Reci-pop files live beside it: `recipe.json`, `assets/`, `prompts/`, and `image-plan.json`.
- Legacy photos can still go in `recipe_files/` and be referenced by filename under `photos:` in the frontmatter.
- The site rebuilds and deploys automatically on merge to master.
-->
